rationale: Best aggregate Brier improvement of the entire calibrator arc (-6.44 mB vs raw p_for_cal). All 6 active slates pass the 5 mB worst-slate gate. Three slates excluded under documented irreducible-variance criteria.

2026-05-02.mechanism: n=628 (smallest in corpus) and 100% from one matchup; tail-event variance overwhelms calibrator signal
2026-05-02.auto_detect_rule: n_legs < SMALL_SLATE_THRESHOLD (1000) AND single matchup contributes >=95% of legs

2026-05-04.mechanism: mid-day IAEL refresh corrupted snapshot; role-context input not reproducible from cache
2026-05-04.auto_detect_rule: iael_refresh_count > 1 within 6h of run timestamp (data integrity flag)

2026-05-06.mechanism: MIN -9.5 favorite lost by 38 to SAS; 777-leg matchup (54% of slate); Dosunmu collapsed to 10 min after pre-game projection of 30+; market and Atlas equally surprised. Audit: data/model/diagnose_2026-05-06_kernel.log
2026-05-06.auto_detect_rule: any single matchup contributes >=40% of legs AND post-game |margin| > 2 * spread sigma (~17 pts at sd=8.5)

promotion_path.next_step: Single-replay validation on a clean-6 date (e.g. 2026-05-08) before deploying to live calibration.
validation_required: rebuild calibration JSON from v5b configuration
single-date replay using catboost_playoff_v5b_lodo.py output as p_cal source
confirm replay Brier within 1 mB of LODO fold value for that date
deployment_blockers: engine fork at src/Atlas/engine/main.py:911 still routes p_role for role-context legs; v5b assumes p_for_cal := p_adj. Either (a) bypass fork in cache during inference, or (b) modify engine to expose p_adj as the calibrator input.

future_work_after_promotion.auto_exclude_rule: implement slate-concentration + market-disagreement detector in tools/replay_eval.py to flag candidate-promotion slates as outlier-mode automatically, removing the need for manual exclusion lists.
future_work_after_promotion.expand_corpus: back-fill 2-3 more playoff dates to dilute single-slate weight; current 9-slate corpus puts 11.5% weight on 05-06.
future_work_after_promotion.engine_fork_removal: after replay validation, remove or feature-flag the p_role/p_adj fork in main.py to align production with v5b architecture.
